testcase.name: verify_account_registration
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Your Account Has Been Created!] but found [no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//h1[text()='Your Account Has Been Created!']"} (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
